objective: Probe whether a second direct/event manipulation dataset can be acquired without credentials and used for the active Manipulation root gate.

sources.name: Mendeley Data: Detecting Crypto Wash Trades via Machine Learning
sources.notes: Public metadata page describes labeled machine learning samples from on-chain transactions of major NFT exchanges and Mt. Gox. No raw row-level files were acquired through no-auth local probes.

sources.name: GitHub: niuniu-zhang/nft_wash_trading
sources.notes: README says raw labeled datasets and generated ML samples are not included; data/results metrics are available but are aggregate outputs only.

next_action: Acquire the Mendeley raw row-level files through browser/UI download, API token, author-provided files, or another public mirror; otherwise continue searching for directly downloadable event/social/on-chain manipulation datasets or L2/L3/MBO/order-lifecycle datasets.
